hooks.name: user_prompt_submit_retrieval
hooks.description: L0+L1 retrieval injection on every user prompt.

hooks.name: transcript_ingest
hooks.description: Append turn JSONL across UserPromptSubmit/Stop/PreCompact/PostCompact for ingestion.

hooks.name: commit_ingest
hooks.description: Capture git commit messages as beliefs (PostToolUse:Bash).

hooks.name: session_start
hooks.description: Inject L0 locked + L2.5 core beliefs at session start.

hooks.name: stop_lock_prompt
hooks.description: Prompt to lock session corrections at turn end (#582).

hooks.name: search_tool
hooks.description: PreToolUse:Grep|Glob memory-first search before agent's own tool fires (#738).

hooks.name: search_tool_bash
hooks.description: PreToolUse:Bash memory-first check on grep/rg/find/fd/ack shell commands (#738).

hooks.name: pre_issue_guard
hooks.description: PreToolUse:Bash duplicate-detection guard before gh issue create (#941).

hooks.name: claude_memory_mirror
hooks.description: PostToolUse:Write|Edit|MultiEdit mirror of claude-memory writes into the belief graph; inert until AELFRICE_MIRROR_CLAUDE_MEMORY / [memory] mirror_claude_memory is set (#985).

hooks.name: agent_context
hooks.description: PreToolUse:Agent worker-context injection — carry L0 locks + prompt-relevant beliefs into dispatched subagent prompts via updatedInput; disable with AELFRICE_AGENT_CONTEXT=0 (#1068).
